features: Complete Hair Styling Accessories – Includes a headband, bobby pins and girls hair bobbles for creating polished looks with ease—perfect for young trendsetters and grown-up glam.
Chic Girls Hair Accessories Gift Set – A curated selection of girls hair accessories and essentials, perfect as gifts for girls and women or to enhance everyday styling routines.
Secure & Comfortable Fit – Each piece offers a secure hold while remaining gentle on hair, making it ideal for school days, parties, and everything in between.
Stylish for All Ages – This set is suited for kids hair accessories for girls, teens or adults seeking sleek, versatile hair accessories with a classic black finish.
Perfect for All Occasions – Whether for special events, everyday wear or birthdays, this is a must-have in the world of girl hair accessories and childrens hair accessories.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Create, Style & Care – Your Hair Essentials All In One Charming Collection! 40pk Black Hair Accessory Add To Basket 200pk Hold Hair Grips Add To Basket 12pk Patterned Bobbles Buying Options Pink Hair Towel Wrap Buying Options 2pk Heatless Curler Set Add To Basket 2pk Mahogany Hair Dye Add To Basket Hair Dye Bowl & Brush Kit Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 2 — — 3.7 out of 5 stars 219 2.5 out of 5 stars 3 3.0 out of 5 stars 5 4.3 out of 5 stars 127 Price £2.79 £ 2 . 79 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 — — £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £4.49 £ 4 . 49 Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Compact & Travel Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Designed for Grooming ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Home Use Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Gentle on Skin & Hair ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What’s included in the Glamorize 40pcs hair accessories gift set? This 2-pack set includes 2 headbands, 24 bobby pins (2 x 12pcs), and 14 hairbands (2 x 7pcs), offering everything needed for secure, stylish hair looks at home or on the go. Is this hair accessory set suitable for girls, teens and women? Yes, it’s designed for all ages. Whether you're after girls hair accessories for school or chic hair bands for women, this set is both stylish and versatile. Can I use these hair accessories for special events like birthdays or weddings? Absolutely. These sleek black accessories are perfect for polished ponytails, elegant buns or subtle up-dos for parties, birthdays, or weddings. Are the accessories secure and comfortable for daily wear? Each item offers a firm yet gentle hold. The elastic bands, headband and pins are lightweight, ensuring a secure fit without pulling or discomfort. Is this a good gift idea for girls or teenagers? Yes, it’s an excellent girls hair accessories gift set—ideal for birthdays, Christmas, party favours, or as a thoughtful surprise for girls, teens or tweens.
